emails.subject: Lets get this ball rolling....
emails.body: Lets get this ball rolling.... John Suarez will be doing this deal tomorrow (1/9/02). His extension is 3-5267.

emails.subject: RE: Lets get this ball rolling....
emails.body: RE: Lets get this ball rolling.... Please add Carl Tricoli and Paul Racico to your distribution list. Thanks, Chief. To: Sewell, Doug; Bentley, Corry; Aucoin, Evelyn; Choate, Jason; Schneider, Chip; Hanse, Patrick; Miller, Don (Asset Mktg); Suarez, John; Williams, Gwendolyn; Lew, Elsie; Confer, Mark

emails.subject: RE: Lets get this ball rolling....
emails.body: RE: Lets get this ball rolling.... YOU ROCK!!!!!!!!!! To: Sewell, Doug; Bentley, Corry; Aucoin, Evelyn; Choate, Jason; Schneider, Chip; Hanse, Patrick; Miller, Don (Asset Mktg); Suarez, John; Williams, Gwendolyn; Lew, Elsie; Confer, Mark; Tricoli, Carl; Racicot, Paul
